welcome: Welcome to Rock, Paper, Scissors, Lizard, Spock
game_rules: First one to 5 points wins. Good luck!
point_system: You get 1 point for a win, .5 points for a tie, and 0 points for a loss!
history_intro: If you'd like to see your move history, type 'his' or 'history' at any point!
choose_opponent: Choose your opponent! Your choices are Hal, Daneel, or R2D2:
invalid_opponent: Sorry, I didn't understand.  If you'd like, choose an abbrieviation, like h, d, or r!
choose_move: Pick rock, paper, scissors, lizard, spock:
invalid_choice: That won't work! If you'd like, choose an abbrieviation, like r, p, s, l, or sp!
history_query: How many rounds do you wish to see? Please pick a number, or 'all':
invalid_help: That won't work! Please pick a number or all!
empty_history: There's no moves yet. Play a round first to see your moves!
goodbye: Thanks for playing Rock, Paper, Scissors, Lizard, Spock. Goodbye!
play_again: Would you like to play again? (y/n):
